questions.q: Which former Virginia Lieutenant Governor died in an apparent murder-suicide alongside his wife on April 16, 2026?
questions.correctText: Justin Fairfax, who served as Virginia's lieutenant governor from 2018 to 2022, fatally shot his wife and then himself in their Annandale home.

questions.q: A historic, 1,200-year-old record from Japan was highlighted in April 2026 as powerful evidence that climate change will continue. What does the continuous record track?
A New Democratic Party (NDP) motion seeking unanimous consent to urge a nationwide ban on what specific retail practice was defeated in the House of Commons in mid-April 2026?
A comprehensive review of 17 clinical trials published in April 2026 concluded that the effect of 'gamechanger' anti-amyloid Alzheimer’s drugs on cognitive decline is what?
In April 2026, the Canada Revenue Agency was revealed to have paid out another bogus income tax refund, this time to a B.C. businesswoman. How much was the refund?
On April 16, 2026, Ukrainian drones successfully struck a major Rosneft oil refinery located in which city in Russia's Krasnodar Krai?
On April 16, 2026, China issued a safety alert advising its citizens to avoid which U.S. airport, citing "malicious questioning" of Chinese scholars by border officers?
During a massive overnight Russian attack on April 15, 2026, Ukrainian air defenses reportedly intercepted over 300 drones and all ballistic missiles within what timeframe?
On April 15, 2026, a Manhattan federal jury ruled that which ticketing giant and its parent company operated as an illegal monopoly over big concert venues?
questions.correctText: A jury found that Live Nation and its subsidiary Ticketmaster had a harmful monopoly over major venues, overcharging buyers by $1.72 per ticket.

questions.q: A federal jury in Miami ordered Carnival Cruise Line to pay $300,000 to an injured passenger after finding the company negligently overserved her 14 shots of what type of alcohol?
questions.correctText: Diana Sanders was awarded $300,000 after falling and suffering injuries when she was served at least 14 shots of tequila aboard the Carnival Radiance.
